title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 8 - Securing Systems
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 8 covers system security fundamentals including strong passwords, encryption, two-factor authentication, and practices to defend against cyber threats. The lecture is part of Harvard's business-focused introduction to computer science and is available through edX with certification options.
